top_signals.title: India’s Fuel Consumption Slips Despite Record Crude Oil Imports
top_signals.summary: Despite recovering energy flows out of the Middle East, India’s fuel consumption last month fell by 3.7% from May to a total of 19.24 million metric tons, Reuters has reported, citing data from the country’s oil ministry. Fuel consumption was also down on the year in June, by 3.1%, the data showed. However, gasoline sales were up on the year, by a substantial 7.4%, even though they were down on the month, by 3.2%. Reuters suggested sales of gasoline to Russia played a role in the sales increase, as Ukrainian drone attacks on Russian…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Stocks Fall as Chipmakers Tumble and Oil Climbs: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks fell as volatility hit chipmakers anew after blowout earnings from Samsung Electronics Co. left investors wanting even more. Bonds slipped as Brent crude headed for the biggest gain in more than a week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: BONK faces $20 million treasury drain after attacker spends $4 million to pass malicious proposal
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: KDDI to conduct AI drone feasibility study in Vietnam and the Philippines
top_signals.summary: KDDI and KDDI SmartDrone will study the potential use of AI drones for disaster prevention and for patrolling and inspecting infrastructure facilities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Trump and the Fifa debacle
top_signals.summary: The US president is the first leader since Benito Mussolini in 1934 to intervene publicly in his team’s favour

top_signals.title: Coinbase secures UK investment services license to add derivatives and equities trading
top_signals.summary: Coinbase secured a UK investment services license to offer derivatives and equities trading in addition to crypto.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
